0.details:
we have been together for 9 years
we met at school (university)
my partner's favorite colour is white
we love watching soccer and do all house choir together
we have 3 kids which we love and support
0.model_generation: Today, I stand before you with a heart full of gratitude and joy. Nine years ago, in the halls of university, we crossed paths and embarked on a journey that has shaped every part of me. You, with your love of white, brought light and clarity into my life, painting our days with hope and possibility. Together, we've cheered at late-night soccer games, our voices rising in unison, and transformed our home into a choir of laughter and harmony. Through every challenge and triumph, you've been my unwavering partner. Now, as we raise our three beautiful children, I promise to honor the love and resilience you show each day. I vow to support you, to listen with compassion, and to nurture our family with patience and joy. I pledge to celebrate your dreams as my own and to walk beside you, hand in hand, for all the days to come. I love you, today and always.

1.details:
we have known each other since we were young
he like jokes and eating
he's a caring friend
we always spend time watching football
he loves car
he got a family of 4 (3 kids and wife)
1.model_generation: Good evening, everyone. I’ve known him since we were kids, passing jokes across the lunch table and dreaming of fast cars. He loved teasing me as much as he loved a good burger, and that sense of humor has never faded. Over the years we’ve cheered for our favorite football teams, shared countless meals, and relied on his caring heart when life felt overwhelming. Now as he stands surrounded by his wonderful wife and three amazing children, I see the same warmth that first drew us together. Here’s to your next journey: more laughter, delicious feasts, thrilling drives, and endless love with your beautiful family. Your dedication to family and loyalty to friends inspire me every day. Let’s raise a glass to celebrate you: a loving husband, devoted father, friend whose spirit makes each moment unforgettable. Cheers!
1.final_version: Good evening, everyone. I’ve known him since we were kids,we attended same school, we were playing together, passing jokes across the lunch table and dreaming of fast cars. He loved teasing me as much as he loved a good bunny chow, and that sense of humor has never faded. Over the years we’ve cheered for our favorite football teams, shared countless meals, and relied on his caring heart when life felt overwhelming. Now as he stands surrounded by his wonderful wife and three amazing children, I see the same warmth that first drew us together. Here’s to your next journey: more laughter, delicious feasts, thrilling drives, and endless love with your beautiful family. Your dedication to family and loyalty to friends inspire me every day. Let’s raise a glass to celebrate you: a loving husband, devoted father, friend whose spirit makes each moment unforgettable. Cheers!

2.details:
he lost his wife on a car accidents
there were married and have kids
there were more than husband and wife but there were also buddies
there were spending most of the time together there were unsepareted
2.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I was deeply saddened to learn of your wife’s tragic passing. Losing someone so dear in such a sudden accident is heartbreaking. I know from all the moments we shared how inseparable you two were—partners in life, best friends, and devoted parents to your wonderful children. Her warm laughter and kindness touched everyone around her, and I will always cherish the memories of our times together as buddies—road trips, backyard barbecues, and quiet evenings talking about dreams and plans.

While no words can ease your pain, please know I am here for you, ready to lend a hand with the kids, run errands, or simply sit with you in silence when you need it. Your family is in my thoughts and prayers during this difficult time. May you find strength in each other and comfort in the love and memories you shared.

With deepest sympathy,
Your friend

3.details:
we were friends in high school
we worked together in one of the biggest company for December jobs
we last see each other at classmates reunion
i lost his contacts details but i found it again on facebook
he's a caring person and a humble gentleman
3.model_generation:
Hey there,

It’s been far too long since our high school days and those hectic December shifts at one of the biggest companies. I still vividly recall how you always looked out for everyone on the team while staying humble through it all. I’ve thought about those late nights and your caring spirit.

Seeing you at the classmates reunion reignited many great memories, but afterwards I realized I'd lost your contact information. Imagine my excitement when I stumbled across your profile on Facebook! It feels we picked up where we left off.

Lately, I’ve been working on a new project that reminded me of our problem-solving sessions at the office. I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to—both professionally and personally. Let’s reconnect soon and share stories over coffee or a call. I miss our conversations and your thoughtful perspective.

Looking forward to catching up.
Warmly,
your old friend.
3.final_version:
Hey there,

It’s been too long since our high school days and those hectic December shifts at one of the biggest companies. I still vividly recall how you always looked out for everyone on the team while staying humble through it all. I’ve thought about those late nights and your caring spirit.

Seeing you at the classmates reunion reignited many great memories, but afterwards I realized I'd lost your contact information. Imagine my excitement when I stumbled across your profile on Facebook! It feels we picked up where we left off.

Lately, I’ve been working on a new project that reminded me of our problem-solving sessions at the office. I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to—both professionally and personally. Let’s reconnect soon and share stories over coffee or a call. I miss our conversations and your thoughtful perspective.We have a lot to catch up, let me know if you are free so that we can make proper arrangement.

Looking forward to catching up.
Warmly,
your old friend.

4.details:
she borrowed me her car when my son ws sick
no one wanted to help me except her
ambulance didn't show up for long time
she's a caring person with a good heart
4.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I wanted to express my heartfelt gratitude for generously lending me your car when my son became ill late that evening. With no one else willing to help and the ambulance delayed, your immediate compassion and selflessness made all the difference. You didn’t hesitate for a moment, and your kindness allowed me to get him to the hospital quickly.

Your caring heart and willingness to step up in a difficult time showed what a remarkable person you are. I’ll never forget how you placed my family’s needs above your own plans, turning a frightening night into something manageable. Your support brought me comfort and reassurance when I needed it most.

Thank you again for your generosity and unwavering goodness. I’m truly blessed to have you in my life, and I hope to repay your kindness someday.

With gratitude and warmest regards,
4.final_version:
Dear friend

I would like to thank you for the great and amazing help that you gave me when my son was sick. No one wanted to help me, but you came front and offered to help me. I tried to call an ambulance but they didn't show up, asked my family friend to help me but he refused.

if it wasn't for your help i don't even want to imagin what would have happen to my son. You such a caring,loving and a nice person.You came when i need help the most, where i thought am loosing my child because of his medical condition.

you are highly appreciated and i will always be greatful for what you did for me. I don't have  lots to say but i wanted to say thank you for being there for me. May God bless you and keep you alive till you seethe upcoming years

Thank you so much

5.details:
i promised my friend to come over his birthday celebration party
i had some family issues that i needed to resolve first
i forgot to tell him that i won't make it to the party
5.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I want to apologize for missing your birthday celebration last week. I valued your invitation and was looking forward to celebrating with you. Unfortunately, a sudden family matter needed my immediate attention and I had to prioritize it. In the rush to handle everything, I forgot to let you know I wouldn’t be able to make it and I regret that.

I understand how hurtful it can be when someone close doesn’t show up or communicate. You deserve better from me. I hope you can forgive my oversight and delay in reaching out. Your special day matters to me, and I’m sorry I fell short.

I would love to make it up to you by taking you out for lunch or coffee at your convenience. Thank you for understanding, and I hope we can celebrate together soon.

Sincerely,
Your friend
5.final_version:
Greetings my friend

I know am the last person you want to talk to, i don't blame you for that but i wish you can take your time to read this letter. Am deeply sorry for not coming to your birthday party celebration. It was not my intension to miss you party, but i had some family crisis.

I didn't know that i will have to face some family challenges. My plan was to calebrate your birthday. A m not proud of what i did because i didn't tell you but it was not my intension.Lot of things happened in few minutes.

As an old brother i hade to fix the problem first before attending anything else.I did a very big mistake for not telling you that i won't make it to the party,i was suppose to tell you as soon as i found out that i won't be coming to the party. Am deeply sorry for what happened
